svg.title: Python indexing vs slicing
svg.desc: Visual showing that indexing refers to positions of elements, slicing refers to gaps between elements, and step-slicing picks every Nth gap.
svg.text: Step slicing - pick every Nth gap
Example: Slice with step 3 → data[::3] → is taking every 3rd element of the list, or making 3 rows and keeping only the first
